name: WEOTT Nexus MVP — Quote + Sheets (Demo/Live)

nodes.name: Append Note LIVE
nodes.notes: Create Nexus Ops Notes tab on production if missing

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;
const upgrades = Array.isArray(body.selectedUpgrades) ? body.selectedUpgrades.join(', ') : (body.selectedUpgrades || '');
const inserts = Array.isArray(body.selectedInserts) ? body.selectedInserts.join(', ') : (body.selectedInserts || '');
return [{ json: {
  mode: body.mode === 'live' ? 'live' : 'demo',
  referenceNumber: body.referenceNumber || '',
  email: body.email || '',
  leadName: body.leadName || '',
  quoteId: body.quoteId || '',
  status: body.status || '',
  version: body.version || '',
  title: body.title || '',
  eventType: body.eventType || '',
  eventDate: body.eventDate || '',
  guestCount: body.guestCount || body.guests || '',
  repeatClient: body.repeatClient === true ? 'YES' : (body.repeatClient === false ? 'NO' : ''),
  selectedUpgrades: upgrades,
  templateId: body.templateId || body.template_id || '',
  selectedInserts: inserts,
  staffContact: body.staffContact || '',
  baseCost: body.baseCost ?? '',
  contingency: body.contingency ?? '',
  margin: body.margin ?? '',
  marginAmount: body.marginAmount ?? '',
  costToClient: body.costToClient ?? body.packageCost ?? '',
  packageCost: body.packageCost ?? body.costToClient ?? '',
  vat: body.vat ?? '',
  upgradeTotal: body.upgradeTotal ?? '',
  grandTotal: body.grandTotal ?? '',
  updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
}}];

nodes.name: Append Quote LIVE
nodes.notes: Create Nexus Ops Quotes on production if missing

_setup: 1. Ensure DEMO sheet has tabs: Enquiry - Lead Data (2026), Nexus Ops Notes, Nexus Ops Quotes (from WEOTT-Nexus-TEST-Sheets.xlsx).
2. On LIVE sheet, create Nexus Ops Notes + Nexus Ops Quotes tabs if missing (same headers as test).
3. Import this workflow → reconnect Google Sheets OAuth on every Sheets node.
4. UI Demo/Live toggle sends mode on every webhook — demo writes only to TEST sheet.
